title: UnifiedFeedItem
description: A single unified feed item from any stream (flash, news, Telegram). Items from existing server feeds are read-only. Missing/unavailable fields MUST be null.

item_id.description: Unique identifier for this feed item across all streams.

stream_type.description: Type of stream this item originated from: flash = flash news, news = full article, tg = Telegram message.

source_label.description: Human-readable source label, e.g. AICoin, BlockBeats, TG_Channel_Name.

published_at_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the item was originally published.

ingested_at_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the item was ingested by the system.

title.description: Item title or headline. MAY be truncated to fit display constraints.

summary.description: Item summary or body text. null if not available or not extracted.

assets.description: List of asset symbols mentioned in the item. Empty array if none detected.

source_url.description: URL to the original source. null if not available.

existing_decision.description: Existing processing decision from the server. null if not previously processed.

raw_reference.description: Reference to raw source data (file path, message ID, etc.). null if not applicable.

source_health.description: Health status of the feed source.
